case_title: MARCIS N DIAZ ET AL VS. CLAUDIA LOBOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. FILED BY DIAZ, MARCIS N GARCIA, JUAN LOBOS, CLAUDIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MARCIS N GARCIA, JUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOBOS, CLAUDIA $5,518.86 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,633.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOBOS, CLAUDIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY DIAZ, MARCIS N GARCIA, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOBOS, CLAUDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MANTI HENRIQUEZ. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---CARLA CUEVAS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOBOS, CLAUDIA
